title: Vulkan Mobile
description: A modpack for mobile Java Edition players on Amethyst/Mojo Launcher with Vulkan API!
body:
Usefull links:

Discord Github CurseForge Modrinth

As you know Minecraft is switching from OpenGL to Vulkan so I'm making Vulkan Mobile to support minecraft to many devices as possible.

Tips/Important Info

  • Vulkan 1.2+ supports devices (has been known to work with 1.0+ but not guaranteed).
  • Enable Use system Vulkan driver, this will automatically allow this mod to work.
  • Shaders DO NOT work currently.
  • Other mods Check This may not work as there's a list of incomatible mods.
  • Tinkering with video settings CAN still help with more FPS
This Modpack contains the following:
  • BadOptimizations
  • Cloth Config v20
  • Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
  • Debugify
  • EntityCulling
  • Fabric API
  • FastQuit
  • FerriteCore
  • ImmediatelyFast
  • Krypton
  • Language Reload
  • Lithium
  • Mod Menu
  • Placeholder API
  • Vulkan Dreno
  • VulkanMod
  • VulkanMod additional libs
  • YetAnotherConfigLib
